name: El Pollo Loco Flame-Broiled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the water, salt, pepper, garlic, and food coloring. Blend on high speed for 15 seconds.
2. Marinate the chicken in the liquid mixture in a bowl or pan for 45 minutes.
3. Turn the chicken and marinate for an additional 30 minutes.
4. Preheat a clean barbecue to medium-low grilling heat.
5. Cook the chicken on the open grill for 45 minutes to 1 hour, turning it often, until the skin is golden brown and crispy.
6. If necessary, lower the heat to prevent scorching or blackening of the skin before the center is fully cooked.
7. Cut the chicken into 8 pieces using a large, sharp knife, cutting the breast in half and separating the thighs from the legs.
Makes: 8 pieces.
